name_en: Sunshine Small Tote, fabric material, decorated with FF pattern jacquard, Sandstone FEND1 ROMA leather lettering. Sandstone organic glass hard handle. Features a spacious lined interior pocket, sandstone leather trim and gold metal hardware. Equipped with two handles and a detachable shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear. Model 8042 Dimensions 16.5*5*17cm
